summary: Live validation, Vee recommendations, posture tracking, and SQLite-backed sessions.

changes.text: Review: heuristic Status chip per row (likely fake / looks real / no live check / active / invalid / error) plus local checks for placeholders, demos, and low-entropy noise

Active validation: per-row Check runs against the real provider from vaultify on your machine (not the browser); outcomes cached in SQLite by match hash without storing plaintext; audit trail; first-use consent per provider
Validator coverage for common APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Slack, GitHub classic and fine-grained PATs, Stripe, SendGrid); AWS pairing deferred
Vee recommendations merge heuristics, validation, and severity into one suggested action per row with optional one-click adopt
Bulk validation and Apply & Secure Everything playbook: stage Vee-aligned decisions for batch review before Apply
Posture: validation status on rows, headline for credentials still present on disk, 30-day rolling history with drift and pruning
Scheduled background re-validation for posture rows whose cache TTL expired
Per-session cap on live validation calls with clear server messaging when the limit is reached
SQLite-backed sessions (WAL, foreign keys) with one-shot import from legacy JSON stores
Posture backfill replays historical sessions idempotently
Activity view merges live server log stream and on-disk audit ledger
Cross-platform shell assets: embedded Windows icon, macOS .app bundles, Linux hicolor set and desktop template
tools/icogen builds .ico, .icns, and Linux PNG sets from one source image (stdlib only)
Walkthrough covers Posture, Activity, vault selection, Review, and Apply
Vee provider strip uses vendor artwork for each LLM backend
Faster posture merges via batched transactions and vault-reference auto-credit during scans
Reports remediation column counts good-practice junkyard actions and op:// references correctly
Clear banner when a scan stops at the configured file cap before navigating to Review
Vee side panel can tuck off the right edge; slim rail restores it; preference saved locally for narrow displays
Version diagnostics trimmed to build metadata only
